An Army deserter (Ray Milland) joins a gambler (Barbara Stanwyck) and a miner (Barry Fitzgerald) against a former slave-trader building a private empire.
programme.title: California

programme.desc: A declared-dead man (Brian Donlevy) hides out with a widow (Ella Raines) after his wife and her lover botch his murder.
programme.title: Impact

programme.desc: Private eye Mike Hammer (Mickey Spillane) asks a bikinied blonde (Shirley Eaton) and others about his long-lost secretary, Velda.
programme.title: The Girl Hunters

programme.desc: Billy the Kid (Jack Buetel), Doc Holliday (Walter Huston) and Pat Garrett hang out with a hussy (Jane Russell).
programme.title: The Outlaw

programme.desc: Bumpkins Moe, Larry and Curly Joe (The Three Stooges) help an ice-skating Snow White (Carol Heiss) find her Prince Charming (Edson Stroll).
programme.title: Snow White and the Three Stooges

programme.desc: Married lawyers (Spencer Tracy, Katharine Hepburn) clash in and out of court over a woman's (Judy Holliday) right to shoot her husband and his lover.
programme.title: Adam's Rib

programme.desc: New York playgirl Holly Golightly puzzles a writer who lives in her building.
programme.title: Breakfast at Tiffany's

programme.desc: Tragedy follows when a new-to-town, troublemaking teen meets other anguished children of feckless parents.
programme.title: Rebel Without a Cause

programme.desc: Clumsy Inspector Jacques Clouseau (Peter Sellers) chases a jewel thief (David Niven) and his nephew (Robert Wagner).
programme.title: The Pink Panther

programme.desc: Friends (Guy Madison, Kim Novak, Brian Keith) join a college student's scheme to rob a Reno casino for kicks.
programme.title: 5 Against the House

programme.desc: A singing comedian (Dean Martin) flops on his own, then soars with a sidekick (Jerry Lewis) but insists on hogging the show.
programme.title: The Stooge

programme.title: The Return of the Pink Panther

programme.title: Breakthrough with Rod Parsley
programme.desc: Breakthrough is the worldwide soul-winning media ministry of Rod Parsley, advancing the kingdom of God around the world through the eye of the camera. With practical teaching helping to grow strong Christians, Breakthrough with Rod Parsley makes a significant impact by boldly proclaiming the authority of Jesus Christ to save, heal and transform. Breakthrough with Rod Parsley is committed to reaching this generation with relevant truth to meet the challenges of the real world.

programme.title: Good Morning LIVE
programme.desc: Good Morning LIVE is an engaging 30-minute program designed to inspire, inform, and connect viewers to the heart of meaningful living. Hosted by James Epperly, this dynamic show brings together a unique blend of inspirational devotions, thought-provoking interviews, and discussions on current events that matter most to you. Each episode offers uplifting messages to start your day on a positive note, insightful conversations with special guests, and a closer look at how current events align with faith and personal growth. Whether you're seeking encouragement, knowledge, or a deeper connection to today's world, Good Morning LIVE is your source for faith-filled and relevant content. Join us weekday mornings to experience a fresh perspective, inspired by truth and guided by hope.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Joyce Meyer, one of the world’s leading practicalBible teachers and New York Times bestselling author, shares encouragement andadvice to help people enjoy daily life.

programme.title: Gospel Truth with Andrew Wommack
programme.desc: Thirty-two years ago a man had an encounter with God that changed his life forever. Today, he shares that experience with thousands of people all over the world. The goal of Andrew Wommack is to reach as many people as possible with the love of God and message of grace and faith. He doesn’t measure the success of the ministry by the number of tapes distributed, books sold or offerings received. The real rewards, and proof that God is alive and working in people’s lives, are the many testimonies he receives from the people impacted by his teachings. To find out more, please visit our website at: http://www.awmi.net http://www.awmi.net/ www.awmi.net

programme.title: Rick Renner
programme.desc: Rick Renner is widely known for his interpretation of the Greek New Testament and his engaging teaching style. His teaching is punctuated by a unique ability to draw vividly descriptive word pictures from the Greek that illuminate the Scriptures in a fresh, new way. Rick also distinctively shares Bible principles through contemporary illustrations set against an extensive cultural and historical backdrop of New Testament times. In each episode of “Rick Renner,” Rick teaches in-depth on a passage of Scripture verse by verse, centered around a specific theme that is vitally relevant to the lives of believers who are hungry to dig deeper into the treasures of God’s Word. For more information, visit http://www.renner.org.

programme.title: Manna Fest With Perry Stone
programme.desc: Manna-fest is the weekly television program of Perry Stone that deals with in-depth prophetic and practical studies of the Word of God. As biblical prophecy continues to unfold, you will find Manna-fest to be a resource to help you better understand where we are now in light of Bible prophecy and what the Bible says about the future. Be sure to tune in each week!

programme.title: The James Epperly Show

The subject matter for the conversation and thequestions will be the things people are afraid to ask, even though it is whateveryone is thinking. programme.title: Great Awakening With Rodney Howard-Brown
programme.desc: Dr. Rodney Howard-Browne is the founder and pastor of Revival Ministries International in Tampa, Florida. In 1983, he pioneered a church in the Northeastern Cape and pastored there for two years. After that, Rodney taught classes in a leading Bible School for another two years. Rodney and his wife Adonica pastor a church in Tampa, Florida, The River at Tampa Bay, which they founded in 1996 and which now has 3000 members. These three things have remained constant since the church’s inception…dynamic praise and worship, anointed preaching and teaching of the Word, and powerful demonstrations of the Holy Spirit and power.

About Paula Paula White-Cain is the President of Paula White Ministries and City of Destiny headquartered in Apopka, Florida, and the spiritual advisor to President Donald Trump. She hosts Paula Today, a nationally syndicated daily broadcast reaching a potential audience of 5.7 billion people in over 200 countries. She is a leading Pastor, a renowned life coach, bestselling author, and highly sought-after motivational speaker. Paula’s commitment to humanity is felt worldwide as she reaches out through numerous charities and compassion ministries, fulfilling her mission and call to transform lives, heal hearts and win souls. She lives in the Orlando area with her husband, Jonathan Cain.

programme.desc: Former Hollywood actress, pop culture expert, Tina Griffin, left her Wisconsin dairy farm at the age of 20 and headed to Hollywood, CA to earn a BA in Film and Television broadcasting from California State University - Los Angeles. Besides being in countless movies, Tina has worked on TV shows such as Jimmy Kimmel Live!, Young and the Restless, Days of Our Lives, Lizzie McGuire, Drake and Josh, and Malcolm in the Middle, competed in the Miss America pageant and worked at the OSCARS. She was involved with the Film Society as well as Women in Film and an active member of the Screen Actors Guild (SAG) and the American Federation of Television and Radio Artists (AFTRA). She has opened for bands such as Colton Dixon, Third Day, and Jeremy Camp. programme.title: 2026 Make it your Best
programme.desc: Welcome to 2026 — a new chapter, not because the calendar has changed, but because you have the opportunity to choose differently. I am so glad you are here, joining us on this incredible journey. At Best Coach TV, our purpose is simple yet profound: to guide you toward a more intentional and fulfilling 2026.

programme.title: 2026 Year of Spiritual Alignment
programme.desc: In this Life Coaching Session we delve into the deeper currents of your being. This is an invitation into stillness, a chance to realign with your true purpose and inner wisdom. Let's connect with what truly nourishes your spirit. Our core message right now is about trusting your inner compass. It is about understanding that you are always guided and supported, even when the path ahead seems unclear. Your spiritual journey is unique.

programme.title: Bible Coaching
programme.desc: There are tens of thousands of personal development books out there, but for me, the Bible is the foundation of wisdom, strength, and direction for every chapter of life. In this episode, we explore how Scripture gives us real guidance for healing, courage, discipline, purpose, and moving forward with confidence. We reflect on Philippians chapter 3, verses 13–14, where Paul reminds us to let go of what’s behind and press forward toward what God has ahead. This is more than inspiration—it’s a powerful life strategy for anyone ready to grow, change, and step into their next chapter.

programme.title: Wealth Building Coaching
programme.desc: Welcome to a transformative program designed to empower you on your journey to financial prosperity. This session focuses on building wealth not just through strategies, but through profound self-discovery. We believe that true financial empowerment begins with asking the right questions.

programme.title: Christian Coaching Session on New Beginnings-for-2026
programme.desc: This Christian life coaching session is rooted in biblical themes of new beginnings and God’s constant presence. The video offers calm guidance, spiritual encouragement, and practical life-coaching reflections to help you let go of the past and invite God into your everyday life. If you’re feeling stuck, tired, or uncertain about the future, this session is designed to bring reassurance, clarity, and hope — reminding you that you don’t have to walk your journey alone. Life coaching is a practical goal-setting process, and when supported by faith and spirituality, it has the power unimaginable.

programme.title: Moment to Pause
programme.desc: Take a brief moment to reflect on your day.

programme.title: Recognizing opportunities life coaching session
programme.desc: Welcome to our Life Changing Channel. In this session we are focusing on Unlocking the Opportunities in your life. How to recognise the opportunities around you. Explore how to chose the right opportunities and understanding the dynamic landscape of your life.

programme.title: 2 Min Coaching on Money Stress
programme.desc: A short, supportive life coaching session designed to help you pause, breathe, and regain clarity when money worries feel overwhelming. This two-minute reset encourages calm reflection, practical awareness, and emotional steadiness, helping you feel more in control and better able to take your next steps with confidence.

programme.title: Daily Inspiration Overcome Obstacles
programme.desc: This program will help you overcome your obstacles. It is your daily inspirational show.

programme.title: Bible Coaching
programme.desc: There are tens of thousands of personal development books out there, but for me, the Bible is the foundation of wisdom, strength, and direction for every chapter of life. In this episode, we explore how Scripture gives us real guidance for healing, courage, discipline, purpose, and moving forward with confidence. We reflect on Philippians chapter 3, verses 13–14, where Paul reminds us to let go of what’s behind and press forward toward what God has ahead. This is more than inspiration—it’s a powerful life strategy for anyone ready to grow, change, and step into their next chapter.

programme.desc: Motivate, excite, empower, spark, lead! This program will INSPIRE you to take the first steps towards your goals. This program is all about inspiration.
